---
title: "TODO — initiative title"
initiative-id: TODO-slug          # == directory name
gantt-section: "TODO"             # A / B / C … — section in the top-level Gantt
status: open                      # open | in-progress | blocked | done
owner: TODO-owner
description: >
  TODO — one-liner used on the initiatives listing card.
---

> TODO — one-paragraph framing of this track: what ties its epics
> together and how they feed the thesis.

## Epics

{{< include _listing.md >}}

{{< include _revisions.md >}}
